title: Senior Doctor - SRL Diagnostics Global Group - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - SRL Diagnostics Global Group - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
SRL Diagnostics Global Group has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Ghaziabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About SRL Diagnostics Global Group:
SRL Diagnostics Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRL Diagnostics Global Group!
